page: Microsoft Azure E4-2ds_v5 is an x86_64 architecture virtual machine belonging to the EDSv5 server family. It is equipped with an Intel Xeon 8370C processor operating at 2.8 GHz, configured with 2 vCPUs mapped to a single physical core with hyper-threading enabled. The system features a dedicated CPU allocation, 32.0 GB of system memory providing 16.0 GB per core, and 154 GB of local storage. It is also capable of utilizing Premium Storage.

Performance benchmarks indicate a clear division between single-core and multi-core capabilities. Single-core performance is moderate, with a stress-ng single-core score of 1890.49 and a Geekbench single-core score of 1630.0, both falling into the average category. However, due to the physical constraint of having only one physical core, multi-core performance is limited, as evidenced by a stress-ng multi-core score of 1933.27 and a Geekbench multi-core score of 1878.0, which are categorized as poor. Memory bandwidth also shows limitations, with uncached read and write speeds for large blocks measured at 14.31 GB/sec and 13.48 GB/sec respectively.

From a cost-efficiency perspective, this instance offers a high memory-to-vCPU ratio, making it a resource-dense option for memory-intensive workloads that do not require heavy parallel processing. The inclusion of 154 GB of local storage provides a localized data cache. This hardware profile is suited for small-scale databases, memory-cached applications like Redis, lightweight enterprise applications, and development environments requiring substantial memory capacity but minimal parallel compute power.
description: The Microsoft Azure E4-2ds_v5 is an x86_64 virtual machine from the EDSv5 family, powered by an Intel Xeon 8370C processor running at 2.8 GHz. It features 2 vCPUs on a single physical core, 32.0 GB of RAM, and 154 GB of local storage. While single-core benchmarks like stress-ng (1890.49) and Geekbench (1630.0) demonstrate average performance, multi-core and memory bandwidth metrics are relatively weak due to the single-core hardware constraint. This server provides a high memory-to-vCPU ratio of 16 GB per core, offering qualitative cost efficiency for memory-heavy, low-compute workloads. It is best suited for small databases, caching layers, and memory-intensive development environments.
og_description: Microsoft Azure E4-2ds_v5 is an EDSv5-family VM featuring an Intel Xeon 8370C CPU, 2 vCPUs, 32 GB RAM, and 154 GB local storage, optimized for memory-intensive workloads with low compute requirements.
meta_description: Microsoft Azure E4-2ds_v5 is a memory-optimized VM with 2 vCPUs, 32 GB RAM, and 154 GB local storage, powered by an Intel Xeon 8370C processor.
tagline: A memory-dense virtual machine featuring a high RAM-to-vCPU ratio and local storage for memory-intensive, low-compute workloads.
bullet_points: Intel Xeon 8370C processor with 2 vCPUs and 1 physical core
32.0 GB of RAM providing a high 16.0 GB per core ratio
154 GB of local storage with Premium Storage capability
Average single-core performance paired with limited multi-core capacity
Suited for small-scale databases, caching layers, and memory-heavy development
